debug_info.goal:
d : ℕ
A : Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential d
Λ : ↑(LorentzGroup d)
⊢ (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential.deriv d)
      (@HSMul.hSMul (↑(LorentzGroup d)) (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential d)
        (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential d) instHSMul Λ A) =
    Λ • (Electromagnetism.DistElectromagneticPotential.deriv d) A

failed_attempts:
ext ε
  simp only [deriv, ContinuousLinearMap.coe_mk', LinearMap.coe_mk, AddHom.coe_mk, LinearMap.smul_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.smul_apply]
  have h_chain : ∀ μ, Λ⁻¹ • (∂_ μ ε) = ∑ ρ, (Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ) • ∂_ ρ (Λ⁻¹ • ε) := by
    intro μ
    ext x
    simp only [SpaceTime.deriv_apply, SchwartzMap.smul_apply, SchwartzMap.deriv_comp_linearMap, Matrix.mul_apply, Finset.sum_apply, Pi.smul_apply, smul_eq_mul]
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    congr
    ext ρ
    simp [Matrix.mul_apply]
  have h_lhs : ∀ μ ν, SpaceTime.distDeriv μ (Λ • A) ε ν =
      ∑ κ, ∑ ρ, (Λ.1 ν κ * Λ⁻¹.1 ρ μ) * SpaceTime.distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ := by
    intro μ ν
    rw [SpaceTime.distDeriv_apply]
    change (- Λ • (A (Λ⁻¹ • (∂_ μ ε)))) ν = _
    simp only [Lorentz.Vector.smul_apply, h_chain, map_sum, map_smul, SpaceTime.distDeriv_apply,
      smul_eq_mul, Finset.sum_apply, Neg.neg_apply, Pi.smul_apply, ContinuousLinearMap.map_sum,
      ContinuousLinearMap.map_smul]
    rw [Finset.sum_comm]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro κ _
    rw [Finset.mul_sum]
    apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
    intro ρ _
    ring
  conv_lhs =>
    enter [1, μ, 1, ν]
    rw [h_lhs]
  simp only [smul_tmul, tmul_smul, smul_smul, Finset.smul_sum, Finset.mul_sum]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro κ _
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro ρ _
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  trans (SpaceTime.distDeriv ρ A (Λ⁻¹ • ε) κ) • (Λ • Lorentz.CoVector.basis ρ) ⊗ₜ[ℝ] (Λ • Lorentz.Vector.basis κ)
  · congr 1
    · rw [← Lorentz.CoVector.smul_basis]
      simp [Finset.smul_sum, smul_smul]
    · rw [← Lorentz.Vector.smul_basis]
      simp [Finset.smul_sum, smul_smul]
  · rw [Tensorial.smul_prod]
    simp [smul_smul]
